title: RVT.BSP.001.FRANCHISSEMENT_ENREGISTRE — Tier upgrade recorded
description: RUNTIME CONTRACT. Every payload published on the bus by CAP.BSP.001.PAL with routing key 'EVT.BSP.001.PALIER_HAUSSE.RVT.BSP.001.FRANCHISSEMENT_ENREGISTRE' MUST validate against this schema. Per ADR-TECH-STRAT-001 Rule 3, the payload is a domain event DDD: data of the upward tier transition (a coherent atomic state-change of the OBJ.BSP.001.CHANGEMENT_PALIER aggregate). It is NOT a snapshot of the read model RES.BSP.001.FRANCHISSEMENT and NOT a field patch. The 'sens' field is constrained to FRANCHISSEMENT (upward direction) for Epic 1 scope; downward crossings (RETROGRADATION) are out of scope and will be contracted in a future epic via RVT.BSP.001.RETROGRADATION_ENREGISTREE. Correlation key: 'identifiant_dossier'. Resolution path: consumers wishing to obtain the canonical beneficiary identifier (OBJ.REF.001.FICHE_BENEFICIAIRE.identifiant_interne) MUST query CAP.REF.001.BEN with 'identifiant_dossier'. The producer does NOT carry the canonical beneficiary identifier on the bus.

identifiant_transition.description: Unique identifier of the upward tier transition. Stable across replays; suitable for idempotency keys at the consumer side.

identifiant_dossier.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the participation case (dossier). Resolution path to OBJ.REF.001.FICHE_BENEFICIAIRE.identifiant_interne is the consumer's responsibility — query CAP.REF.001.BEN with this value. The producer never carries 'identifiant_interne' on the wire (privacy + decoupling per ADR-BCM-URBA-0009).

palier_precedent.description: Tier code BEFORE the upward transition (e.g. 'T0', 'T1'). Domain rule: must be strictly lower than 'nouveau_palier' (upward direction).

nouveau_palier.description: Tier code AFTER the upward transition (e.g. 'T1', 'T2', 'T3'). Domain rule: must be strictly higher than 'palier_precedent' for sens=FRANCHISSEMENT.

sens.description: Transition direction. CONSTRAINED to 'FRANCHISSEMENT' (upward) for Epic 1. Downward transitions (RETROGRADATION) belong to a separate resource event RVT.BSP.001.RETROGRADATION_ENREGISTREE in a future epic. Both 'const' and single-value 'enum' are declared for cross-validator compatibility (Draft 2020-12 'const' + Draft-7-compatible 'enum' fallback).

declencheur.description: Trigger source of the transition. ALGORITHME = computed by the autonomy-tier engine from behavioural signals. SURCHARGE_PRESCRIPTEUR = forced by a prescriber override (CAP.BSP.001.ARB).

score_au_moment.description: Behavioural score value at the time the transition was recorded. Snapshotted from CAP.BSP.001.SCO at the transition timestamp (out-of-band correlation; not re-queried by consumers).

timestamp_transition.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the upward transition was recorded by CAP.BSP.001.PAL.

est_sortie_programme.description: True if this upgrade reaches the FINAL tier — triggers the programme exit procedure (transfer to standard banking app via CAP.BSP.002.SOR). False otherwise.
